$comment: GateTest configuration for Crontech. BLK-007 observation sprint. See docs/BUILD_BIBLE.md BLK-007.

unitTests.reason: native bun run test already runs as a separate CI job

e2e.reason: BLK-007 observation sprint — enable once live preview URL is available in CI

visual.reason: visual regressions — the exact class of bug (bunched nav, clipped CORE badge, broken glyphs) that slipped through before BLK-007

links.reason: native bun run check-links already runs as a CI step

documentation.reason: BLK-007 observation sprint — re-enable once internal docs are stable

liveCrawler.reason: BLK-007 observation sprint — enable once a PR preview URL is served in CI (requires BLK-009)

chaos.reason: reserved for BLK-011 CRDT collab production hardening

mutation.reason: too slow for every-PR gating; run manually on major refactors

aiReview.reason: Claude reviews the diff for logic / design / positioning drift. Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

fakeFixDetector.reason: catches 'Claude claimed to fix it but didn't' — the exact failure mode from the 14 April 2026 iPad screenshot incident

gating.reason: HARD GATE per CLAUDE.md §0.4.2 (flipped 2026-04-21 by Craig directive). Red GateTest blocks merge, full stop. The prior 'report-only' observation sprint is retired.

pullRequest.reason: Every PR opened from agent branch prefixes (claude/*, gatetest/*) must be auto-scanned. Targets main/master/Main on Crontech (default branch is capitalised Main).

schedule.name: empire-smoke
schedule.reason: Runs the cross-repo smoke harness every 5 minutes. Surfaces cert / DNS / response-code regressions before a human notices. Owned by agent 6 — ensure integrations/smoke/empire-smoke.ts exists before flipping schedule to required.

setup.name: install-caddy
setup.run: curl -fsSL https://github.com/caddyserver/caddy/releases/download/v2.8.4/caddy_2.8.4_linux_amd64.tar.gz | tar -xz -C /tmp caddy && sudo mv /tmp/caddy /usr/local/bin/caddy && caddy version

caddyfileValidate.reason: Caddyfile syntax errors have taken prod down before; validate via the real caddy binary whenever infra/caddy/** changes. Failure blocks merge.

schemaRegressionGate.reason: When exported types or DB schemas move, re-typecheck every dependent package so the ripple doesn't land silently.

secretLeak.reason: Verify .env / *.pem / id_rsa / hardcoded tokens don't slip through. Overlaps with secrets module above — this is the path-level belt-and-braces gate.

releaseNotesValidator.message: User-visible change detected but no CHANGELOG.md entry. This is a soft warn — merge is not blocked.
releaseNotesValidator.reason: Soft reminder: PRs tagged user-visible / feature / breaking should touch a CHANGELOG. Warn only, never block.

rules.documentation.apiDocs: tRPC types serve as the API spec

doctrine.reason: aiReview module cross-references these when grading a diff to detect locked-block violations.
